scripts.test: bun test protocol client/src scripts/capture-daemon-corpus.test.ts scripts/desktop scripts/release-workflow.test.ts scripts/test
scripts.check: tsc -p protocol/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.scripts.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.e2e.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.parity.json --noEmit && bun run --cwd client check
scripts.check:rs: cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo clippy --locked --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test
